channel.title: Saw Ye Htet - Writing
channel.description: Notes on IT support, troubleshooting, and building software.

item.title: The Long Way to a Plain Door
item.description: The first version of this site was a working desktop you could click around inside. I was proud of it. Then I hid it behind a door and put a plain page in front, and I think that was the better decision. This is the reasoning.
